steps.title: Convert the percentage decrease to a decimal multiplier
steps.content: Decreasing by 0.34% means we subtract 0.34% from 100%, leaving 99.66% of the original. In decimal form: $99.66\% = 0.9966$. This is our multiplier.

steps.title: Identify the coefficient k
steps.content: The decreased force equals the multiplier times the original: $$0.9966x = kx$$ Therefore, $k = 0.9966$.
